examples: Put forward the counter plans for brand crisis at the light of forewarning analysis.
Quick and unexpected deaths are not uncommon, but most deaths occur with some forewarning.
According to the basic principle of enterprise forewarning, the forewarning index system is the core of enterprise's forewarning management.
Mr Bryant angrily denied press reports that British authorities had any forewarning of the attack in a Dubai hotel.
